title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at Lenovo India Capital India

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at Lenovo India Capital India
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? Lenovo India Capital India in Bhubaneswar offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Lenovo India Capital India:
Lenovo India Capital India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in CI/CD

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lenovo India Capital India!
